fields.label: Enable Receipt OCR
fields.description: When off, the petty-cash receipt scanner returns empty defaults and the user fills the form manually.

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Haiku is fast and cheap, recommended for receipt OCR. Switch to Sonnet only if you see consistent extraction errors.

fields.label: Anthropic API Key
fields.description: Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys . Stored encrypted at rest.

fields.label: Monthly call cap (soft)
fields.description: Soft guardrail. When exceeded in a calendar month the server logs an Error Log entry and OCR returns empty defaults until reset. Set 0 to disable.

fields.label: Default site radius (m)
fields.description: Used when a Project has site coordinates set but no explicit radius.
